hints.title: Gentle nudge
hints.text: This unofficial board uses 5 answer paths and blocked cells. Start by tracing the most constrained corner.

hints.title: Direction clue
hints.text: After each word, continue from a neighboring cell instead of jumping across the board.

hints.title: Almost there
hints.text: Every open cell belongs to exactly one answer path, so completed words should tile the board.

explanation: Unofficial Practice #1 is a pregenerated Wend-style practice board. The verified solution uses every open cell exactly once across APPLE, CRANE, GRACE, LEMON, MUSIC.
quickHint: Trace adjacent letters and avoid reusing cells.
fastTip: When a path reaches an edge, check the neighboring cell that keeps the route connected.
commonMistake: Do not treat this as a normal word search; Wend paths can turn and must tile every open cell.
difficultyNote: Easy because this 6x6 practice grid has 5 separate paths and obstacle cells.

explanation: Unofficial Practice #68 is a pregenerated Wend-style practice board. The verified solution uses every open cell exactly once across VINTAGE, BLANKET, COCONUT, FESTIVE, HORIZON, MEASURE, POPULAR.
quickHint: Trace adjacent letters and avoid reusing cells.
fastTip: When a path reaches an edge, check the neighboring cell that keeps the route connected.
commonMistake: Do not treat this as a normal word search; Wend paths can turn and must tile every open cell.
difficultyNote: Hard because this 8x8 practice grid has 7 separate paths and obstacle cells.

hints.title: Gentle nudge
hints.text: This unofficial board uses 7 answer paths and blocked cells. Start by tracing the most constrained corner.

hints.title: Direction clue
hints.text: After each word, continue from a neighboring cell instead of jumping across the board.
